lines.hearsay: There was dictating going on at {place}, and a pen keeping up.
lines.gossip: {A} never once walked it up to the board — {B} wrote the iron down for {A} at {place}, and neither of them said out loud whose cart it was that was late.
lines.report: {A}'s requisition for pig iron taken down by {B} at {place}, slot {slot}.
